name: Exam Generation Engine
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for question generation, distractor creation, rubric authoring, answer key generation, and difficulty calibration

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Question bank, exam templates, generated exams, rubrics, answer keys, difficulty metadata, usage analytics

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for item analysis

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Source materials (textbooks, syllabi), generated exam PDFs, answer sheets, rubric documents, media assets

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Serverless exam generation pipeline — question creation, difficulty calibration, PDF rendering, batch processing

services.name: Azure AI Content Safety
services.purpose: Screen generated questions for bias, inappropriate content, cultural sensitivity, and age-appropriateness

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Semantic search across curriculum standards, question banks, and source materials for aligned question generation

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: API keys, encryption keys for exam content, signing certificates for answer keys, OAuth secrets

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Generation quality metrics, difficulty distribution accuracy, bias detection rates, pipeline performance

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for multiple-choice distractor generation and simple recall questions, reserve GPT-4o for complex essay prompts and rubric authoring — saves 65% on AI costs
Cache generated questions by topic-difficulty-type key — reuse across exam variants instead of regenerating from scratch
Batch exam generation during off-peak hours — Functions consumption plan charges only for execution time, zero cost when idle
Pre-index curriculum standards (Common Core, AP, IB) in AI Search — standards change annually, not daily
Use Blob Storage lifecycle policies to move generated exams older than 1 year to cool storage — reduces ongoing storage costs by 50%
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
